title: How a Godly Man Works When the Boss Isn't Watching
caption:
How a godly man works when the boss isn't watching.

Anyone can look sharp with someone grading them. The real test is the hour nobody checks. The half-finished task you could leave half-finished and no one would ever know.

Colossians 3:23 was never a productivity verse. "Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men." That's a question of who you're actually clocked in for.

Excellence when no one's watching isn't perfectionism. It's worship nobody claps for.

Save this for the next time you're tempted to cut the corner no one would catch.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #manofgod #workethic #colossians #diligence
